nodes.label: AI for menial tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for core analytical and creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I would typically use AI for menial tasks such as drafting emails, and sorting data into tables. I would also use it for preliminary research tasks

nodes.label: AI as research starting point
nodes.grounding_span: I will rely on AI to do an initial scan of the industry/area and surface the most relevant historical aspects I should then look into myself

nodes.label: AI trustworthiness and verification
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle any task myself where the consequences of AI hallucination are more than minimally significant

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and idea generator
nodes.grounding_span: I also prefer to handle any brainstorming tasks myself, as over-reliance on AI could lead to more narrow and structured thinking

nodes.label: AI as task delegator for complete tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I will delegate it complete tasks, as mentioned, mainly menial ones or initial research queries. There is very little collaboration throughout the lifespan of a project

nodes.label: AI use sanctioned by workplace
nodes.grounding_span: In my workplace our use of public AI platforms is dictated by policies aimed at maintaining the confidentiality of private data

nodes.label: AI as drafting assistant for emails
nodes.grounding_span: The use of AI to quickly draft update emails to clients about quite minor details has been most satisfying

nodes.label: Trustworthiness and accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: the consequences of AI hallucination are more than minimally significant

nodes.label: Privacy and data security
nodes.grounding_span: confidential client information/confidential instructions from the client, which is not permitted to be shared with public AI platforms

nodes.label: Positive view of AI for menial tasks
nodes.grounding_span: The use of AI to quickly draft update emails to clients about quite minor details has been most satisfying

nodes.label: Caution toward AI in high-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle any task myself where the consequences of AI hallucination are more than minimally significant

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for brainstorming
nodes.grounding_span: I also prefer to handle any brainstorming tasks myself

nodes.label: Compliance with workplace AI discouragement
nodes.grounding_span: In my workplace our use of public AI platforms is dictated by policies aimed at maintaining the confidentiality of private data; however, there is still broad use

nodes.label: Risk-based task delegation — distinguishes high-risk from low-risk tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle any task myself where the consequences of AI hallucination are more than minimally significant

nodes.label: Task-dependent delegation vs. collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I will delegate it complete tasks... There is very little collaboration throughout the lifespan of a project
